---
title: "Control Group Analysis: Repositories without prior AI traces (AF) vs Repositories with prior AI traces (IF)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev = 'CairoPNG', dpi = 150)
options(bitmapType = 'cairo')
utils::globalVariables(c(
    "estimate", "is_significant", "conf.low", "conf.high",
    "term", "setting", "outcome", "outcome_label", "time"
))
```

## Loading Required Packages

```{r load_packages}
library(didimputation)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(Cairo)
```

## Loading and Preparing the Data

```{r load_data}
# Create output directories if they don't exist
if (!dir.exists("../results")) {
    dir.create("../results", recursive = TRUE)
    cat("Created results directory\n")
}
if (!dir.exists("../plots")) {
    dir.create("../plots", recursive = TRUE)
    cat("Created plots directory\n")
}

panel_data <- fread("../data/panel_event_monthly.csv")

# Convert variables to DiD required format
# Keep original repo names (strings) for mapping
panel_data$repo_name_str <- panel_data$repo_name
panel_data$repo_name <- as.numeric(factor(panel_data$repo_name))

panel_data$time <- as.numeric(gsub("-", "", panel_data$time))
panel_data$event[!is.na(panel_data$event)] <- as.numeric(
    gsub("-", "", panel_data$event[!is.na(panel_data$event)]))
panel_data$event[is.na(panel_data$event)] <- 0
# panel_data <- panel_data[panel_data$event < 202401 # never treated
#         | (panel_data$event > 202407 & panel_data$event <= 202503)]
panel_data$event <- as.integer(panel_data$event)
panel_data$quality_warnings <- panel_data$code_smells + panel_data$vulnerabilities + panel_data$bugs

# Create delta metrics before log transformation
# First, sort data and compute changes from previous time point
panel_data <- panel_data %>%
    arrange(repo_name, time) %>%
    group_by(repo_name) %>%
    mutate(
        # Compute changes from previous time point
        delta_code_smells = code_smells - lag(code_smells, default = 0),
        delta_vulnerabilities = vulnerabilities - lag(vulnerabilities, default = 0),
        delta_bugs = bugs - lag(bugs, default = 0),

        # Compute delta per line added (avoid division by zero)
        code_smells_per_line = delta_code_smells / (lines_added + 1),
        vulnerabilities_per_line = delta_vulnerabilities / (lines_added + 1),
        bugs_per_line = delta_bugs / (lines_added + 1)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

# Log transform skewed variables
panel_data$commits <- log(panel_data$commits + 1)
panel_data$lines_added <- log(panel_data$lines_added + 1)
panel_data$code_smells <- log(panel_data$code_smells + 1)
panel_data$vulnerabilities <- log(panel_data$vulnerabilities + 1)
panel_data$bugs <- log(panel_data$bugs + 1)
panel_data$cognitive_complexity <- log(panel_data$cognitive_complexity + 1)
panel_data$duplicated_lines_density <- log(panel_data$duplicated_lines_density + 1)
panel_data$comment_lines_density <- log(panel_data$comment_lines_density + 1)
panel_data$age <- log(panel_data$age + 1)
panel_data$contributors <- log(panel_data$contributors + 1)
panel_data$stars <- log(panel_data$stars + 1)
panel_data$issues <- log(panel_data$issues + 1)
panel_data$issue_comments <- log(panel_data$issue_comments + 1)
panel_data$quality_warnings <- log(panel_data$quality_warnings + 1)

# Handle delta metrics transformation (can be negative, so use signed log)
# Use signed log transformation: sign(x) * log(|x| + 1)
panel_data$code_smells_per_line <- sign(panel_data$code_smells_per_line) * log(abs(panel_data$code_smells_per_line) + 1)
panel_data$vulnerabilities_per_line <- sign(panel_data$vulnerabilities_per_line) * log(abs(panel_data$vulnerabilities_per_line) + 1)
panel_data$bugs_per_line <- sign(panel_data$bugs_per_line) * log(abs(panel_data$bugs_per_line) + 1)

# Create treatment indicator and time since treatment variables
panel_data$treated <- ifelse(panel_data$event > 0, 1, 0)
panel_data$time_since_treatment <- ifelse(panel_data$treated == 1,
                                         panel_data$time - panel_data$event,
                                         NA)


```

## DiD Analysis with DiD Imputation Package

```{r did_analysis}
# List of outcome variables

outcome_vars <- c(
    "commits",
    "lines_added",
    "duplicated_lines_density",
    "comment_lines_density",
    "quality_warnings",
    "cognitive_complexity"
)
outcome_names <- c(
    "Commits",
    "Lines Added",
    "Duplicated Lines Density",
    "% Comment Lines",
    "Static Analysis Warnings",
    "Cognitive/Code Complexity"
)

base_settings <- c(
    "Repositories without prior AI traces (AF)",
    "Repositories with prior AI traces (IF)"
)

build_setting_variant <- function(data, setting_label) {
    dt <- data
    # Base settings
    if (setting_label == "Repositories without prior AI traces (AF)") {
        dt <- dt[dt$matched_agent_first_or_corresponding_matched_control == TRUE | is.na(dt$matched_agent_first_or_corresponding_matched_control), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "Repositories with prior AI traces (IF)") {
        dt <- dt[dt$matched_ide_first_or_corresponding_matched_control == TRUE | is.na(dt$matched_ide_first_or_corresponding_matched_control), ]
    # Full subset settings
    } else if (setting_label == "L1 Full Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l1_full_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l1_full_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L2 Full Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l2_full_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l2_full_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L12 Full Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l12_full_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l12_full_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L3 Full Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l3_full_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l3_full_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L4 Full Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l4_full_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l4_full_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L2+ Full Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$`l2+_full_subset` == TRUE | is.na(dt$`l2+_full_subset`), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L3+ Full Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$`l3+_full_subset` == TRUE | is.na(dt$`l3+_full_subset`), ]
    # Agent subset settings
    } else if (setting_label == "L1 Agent Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l1_agent_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l1_agent_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L2 Agent Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l2_agent_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l2_agent_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L12 Agent Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l12_agent_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l12_agent_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L3 Agent Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l3_agent_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l3_agent_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L4 Agent Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l4_agent_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l4_agent_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L2+ Agent Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$`l2+_agent_subset` == TRUE | is.na(dt$`l2+_agent_subset`), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L3+ Agent Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$`l3+_agent_subset` == TRUE | is.na(dt$`l3+_agent_subset`), ]
    # IDE subset settings
    } else if (setting_label == "L1 IDE Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l1_ide_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l1_ide_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L2 IDE Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l2_ide_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l2_ide_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L12 IDE Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l12_ide_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l12_ide_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L3 IDE Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l3_ide_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l3_ide_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L4 IDE Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$l4_ide_subset == TRUE | is.na(dt$l4_ide_subset), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L2+ IDE Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$`l2+_ide_subset` == TRUE | is.na(dt$`l2+_ide_subset`), ]
    } else if (setting_label == "L3+ IDE Subset") {
        dt <- dt[dt$`l3+_ide_subset` == TRUE | is.na(dt$`l3+_ide_subset`), ]
    }
    dt
}
```

## Aggregate Treatment Effects - Base Settings

```{r aggregate_effects}
# Function to extract static treatment effects (overall effect)
get_static_effects <- function(outcome_var, data) {
    # Run static DiD (no horizon/pretrends specified)
    static_result <- did_imputation(
        data = data,
        yname = outcome_var,
        gname = "event",
        tname = "time",
        idname = "repo_name",
        first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time
    )

    return(static_result)
}

# Calculate static effects for each base setting
static_results_by_setting <- list()
for (setting in base_settings) {
    cat("Calculating aggregate effects for:", setting, "\n")
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    static_results_by_setting[[setting]] <- list()
    for (var in outcome_vars) {
        static_results_by_setting[[setting]][[var]] <- get_static_effects(var, data_s)
    }
}

# Create comparison dataframe
static_comparison <- data.frame()
for (setting in base_settings) {
    static_df <- data.frame(
        Setting = setting,
        Outcome = names(static_results_by_setting[[setting]]),
        Estimate = sapply(static_results_by_setting[[setting]], function(x) x$estimate[x$term == "treat"]),
        SE = sapply(static_results_by_setting[[setting]], function(x) x$std.error[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Lower = sapply(static_results_by_setting[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.low[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Upper = sapply(static_results_by_setting[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.high[x$term == "treat"])
    )
    static_comparison <- rbind(static_comparison, static_df)
}

# Calculate p-values from estimate and SE
static_comparison$p_value <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(static_comparison$Estimate / static_comparison$SE))

# Add significance stars
static_comparison$Sig <- ifelse(static_comparison$p_value < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(static_comparison$p_value < 0.01, "**",
                         ifelse(static_comparison$p_value < 0.05, "*",
                         ifelse(static_comparison$p_value < 0.1, ".", ""))))

# Calculate percent change: 100*(e^β - 1)
static_comparison$Percent_Change <- 100 * (exp(static_comparison$Estimate) - 1)

# Clean outcome names for display
static_comparison$Outcome <- gsub("log\\((.+) \\+ 1\\)", "\\1", static_comparison$Outcome)
static_comparison$Outcome <- gsub("_", " ", static_comparison$Outcome)
static_comparison$Outcome <- tools::toTitleCase(static_comparison$Outcome)

# Display static effects
knitr::kable(static_comparison,
    digits = 3,
    col.names = c("Setting", "Outcome", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Lower", "CI Upper", "p-value", "Sig", "% Change"),
    caption = "Static Treatment Effects Comparison: AF vs IF Control Groups (*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05, . p<0.1)",
    row.names = FALSE
) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
        full_width = FALSE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows(base_settings[1], 1, length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows(base_settings[2], length(outcome_vars) + 1, 2 * length(outcome_vars))

# Export static effects to CSV
write.csv(static_comparison, "../results/static_effects_base_settings.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Static effects exported to ../results/static_effects_base_settings.csv\n")
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects (Event Study)

```{r dynamic_effects_6outcomes, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
settings <- base_settings

collect_dynamic_results <- function(outcomes, settings) {
    results <- list()
    for (s in settings) {
        data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, s)
        for (y in outcomes) {
            tryCatch({
                dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                    data = data_s,
                    yname = y,
                    gname = "event",
                    tname = "time",
                    idname = "repo_name",
                    first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                    horizon = -6:6,
                    pretrends = -6:-2
                )
                dyn$setting <- s
                dyn$outcome <- y
                results[[length(results) + 1]] <- dyn
            }, error = function(e) {
                cat("Warning: Skipping", s, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
                cat("Error message:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
            })
        }
    }
    dplyr::bind_rows(results)
}

dyn_all <- collect_dynamic_results(outcome_vars, settings)

count_setting_stats <- function(setting_name) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting_name)
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    n_obs <- nrow(data_s)
    list(treat = n_treat, control = n_control, obs = n_obs)
}
setting_stats <- lapply(settings, count_setting_stats)
settings_with_counts <- paste0(settings, " (n=", sapply(setting_stats, `[[`, "treat"),
                               "+", sapply(setting_stats, `[[`, "control"),
                               ", obs=", sapply(setting_stats, `[[`, "obs"), ")")
names(settings_with_counts) <- settings

plot_dyn <- dyn_all[dyn_all$term != "treat", ]
plot_dyn$time <- as.numeric(plot_dyn$term)
plot_dyn <- plot_dyn[plot_dyn$time >= -6 & plot_dyn$time <= 6, ]

label_map <- setNames(outcome_names, outcome_vars)
plot_dyn$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_dyn$outcome]
plot_dyn <- plot_dyn[!is.na(plot_dyn$outcome_label), ]
plot_dyn$outcome_label <- factor(plot_dyn$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
plot_dyn$setting_label <- settings_with_counts[plot_dyn$setting]
plot_dyn$setting_label <- factor(plot_dyn$setting_label, levels = settings_with_counts, ordered = TRUE)
plot_dyn$setting <- factor(plot_dyn$setting, levels = settings, ordered = TRUE)
plot_dyn$significant <- (plot_dyn$conf.low > 0) | (plot_dyn$conf.high < 0)

plot_dyn$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_dyn$significant, "solid", "dotted")
pos <- position_dodge(width = 0.5)

key_outcomes <- c("Commits", "Lines Added", "% Comment Lines", "Duplicated Lines Density", 
                  "Static Analysis Warnings", "Cognitive/Code Complexity")
plot_dyn_key <- plot_dyn[plot_dyn$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
plot_dyn_key$outcome_label <- factor(plot_dyn_key$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)

# Calculate percentage change for export
plot_dyn_key$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_dyn_key$estimate) - 1)

# Export dynamic effects to CSV
dynamic_export <- plot_dyn_key[, c("setting", "outcome_label", "time", "estimate", "std.error", 
                                   "conf.low", "conf.high", "significant", "percent_change")]
colnames(dynamic_export) <- c("Setting", "Outcome", "Time", "Estimate", "SE", 
                              "CI_Lower", "CI_Upper", "Significant", "Percent_Change")
write.csv(dynamic_export, "../results/dynamic_effects_base_settings.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Dynamic effects exported to ../results/dynamic_effects_base_settings.csv\n")

dynamic_plot_6_onerow <- ggplot(plot_dyn_key, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting_label)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                  position = pos, width = 0.4) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = significant, fill = after_scale(ifelse(significant, color, NA))),
               position = pos, size = 1.5) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
    scale_linetype_identity() +
    scale_color_manual(values = setNames(c(
        "#0072B2",  # Repositories without prior AI traces (AF) - Blue
        "#D55E00"   # Repositories with prior AI traces (IF) - Orange
    ), settings_with_counts), drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
        x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
        y = "Treatment Effect",
        color = "Setting",
        caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)"
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
        legend.margin = margin(b = 3),
        legend.box.margin = margin(t = -5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)

print(dynamic_plot_6_onerow)

ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects.pdf",
  plot = dynamic_plot_6_onerow, width = 18, height = 4,
  device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects with Percentage Values

```{r dynamic_effects_with_percentages, fig.width=18, fig.height=5}
# Calculate percentage change for text labels
plot_dyn_key$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_dyn_key$estimate) - 1)

# Create the same plot with percentage labels
dynamic_plot_with_pct <- ggplot(plot_dyn_key, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting_label)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                  position = pos, width = 0.4) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = significant, fill = after_scale(ifelse(significant, color, NA))),
               position = pos, size = 1.5) +
    # Add percentage text labels
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
              vjust = -0.8, size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
    scale_linetype_identity() +
    scale_color_manual(values = setNames(c(
        "#0072B2",  # Repositories without prior AI traces (AF) - Blue
        "#D55E00"   # Repositories with prior AI traces (IF) - Orange
    ), settings_with_counts), drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
        x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
        y = "Treatment Effect",
        color = "Setting",
        caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)\nPercentage values show % change: 100*(e^β - 1)"
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11, margin = margin(t = 3)),
        legend.margin = margin(b = 3),
        legend.box.margin = margin(t = -5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)

print(dynamic_plot_with_pct)

ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_with_percentages.pdf",
  plot = dynamic_plot_with_pct, width = 18, height = 5,
  device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
```

# Maturity Level Analysis: Full Subset (AF OR IF)

This section analyzes the impact across different maturity levels for repos in the matched dataset (either AF or IF).

## Full Subset Settings

```{r full_subset_setup}
full_subset_settings <- c(
    "L1 Full Subset",
    "L2 Full Subset",
    "L12 Full Subset",
    "L3 Full Subset",
    "L4 Full Subset",
    "L2+ Full Subset",
    "L3+ Full Subset"
)
```

## Aggregate Treatment Effects - Full Subset

```{r full_subset_static}
# Calculate static effects for full subset settings
static_results_full <- list()
for (setting in full_subset_settings) {
    cat("Calculating aggregate effects for:", setting, "\n")
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    static_results_full[[setting]] <- list()
    for (var in outcome_vars) {
        static_results_full[[setting]][[var]] <- get_static_effects(var, data_s)
    }
}

# Create comparison dataframe
static_comparison_full <- data.frame()
for (setting in full_subset_settings) {
    static_df <- data.frame(
        Setting = setting,
        Outcome = names(static_results_full[[setting]]),
        Estimate = sapply(static_results_full[[setting]], function(x) x$estimate[x$term == "treat"]),
        SE = sapply(static_results_full[[setting]], function(x) x$std.error[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Lower = sapply(static_results_full[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.low[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Upper = sapply(static_results_full[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.high[x$term == "treat"])
    )
    static_comparison_full <- rbind(static_comparison_full, static_df)
}

# Calculate p-values and significance
static_comparison_full$p_value <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(static_comparison_full$Estimate / static_comparison_full$SE))
static_comparison_full$Sig <- ifelse(static_comparison_full$p_value < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_full$p_value < 0.01, "**",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_full$p_value < 0.05, "*",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_full$p_value < 0.1, ".", ""))))
static_comparison_full$Percent_Change <- 100 * (exp(static_comparison_full$Estimate) - 1)

# Clean outcome names
static_comparison_full$Outcome <- gsub("log\\((.+) \\+ 1\\)", "\\1", static_comparison_full$Outcome)
static_comparison_full$Outcome <- gsub("_", " ", static_comparison_full$Outcome)
static_comparison_full$Outcome <- tools::toTitleCase(static_comparison_full$Outcome)

# Display static effects table
knitr::kable(static_comparison_full,
    digits = 3,
    col.names = c("Setting", "Outcome", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Lower", "CI Upper", "p-value", "Sig", "% Change"),
    caption = "Static Treatment Effects: Full Subset by Maturity Level (*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05, . p<0.1)",
    row.names = FALSE
) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
        full_width = FALSE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L1 Full Subset", 1, length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L2 Full Subset", length(outcome_vars) + 1, 2 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L12 Full Subset", 2 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 3 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L3 Full Subset", 3 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 4 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L4 Full Subset", 4 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 5 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L2+ Full Subset", 5 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 6 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L3+ Full Subset", 6 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 7 * length(outcome_vars))

# Export static effects to CSV
write.csv(static_comparison_full, "../results/static_effects_full_subset.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Static effects exported to ../results/static_effects_full_subset.csv\n")
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects - Full Subset

```{r full_subset_dynamic, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Define colors for each setting
full_subset_colors <- c(
    "#E69F00",  # L1 - Orange
    "#56B4E9",  # L2 - Sky Blue
    "#CC79A7",  # L12 - Pink
    "#009E73",  # L3 - Green
    "#F0E442",  # L4 - Yellow
    "#0072B2",  # L2+ - Blue
    "#D55E00"   # L3+ - Dark Orange
)
names(full_subset_colors) <- full_subset_settings

# Create a plot for each setting
for (i in seq_along(full_subset_settings)) {
    setting <- full_subset_settings[i]
    setting_color <- full_subset_colors[setting]
    
    # Get filtered data for this setting
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    # Get counts for this setting
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    n_obs <- nrow(data_s)
    setting_label <- paste0(setting, " (n=", n_treat, "+", n_control, ", obs=", n_obs, ")")
    
    # Run dynamic analysis for this setting
    setting_results <- list()
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            setting_results[[length(setting_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
    
    if (length(setting_results) == 0) {
        cat("Skipping plot for", setting, "- no results available\n")
        next
    }
    
    # Combine results for this setting
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(setting_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    # Add outcome labels
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    # Filter to key outcomes
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, color = setting_color) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), fill = setting_color,
                   size = 2, color = setting_color) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = setting_label,
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    
    # Save individual plot
    ggsave(paste0("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_", tolower(gsub(" ", "_", gsub("\\+", "plus", setting))), ".pdf"),
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 4,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects - Full Subset (with Percentages)

```{r full_subset_dynamic_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=5}
# Create a plot for each setting with percentage labels
for (i in seq_along(full_subset_settings)) {
    setting <- full_subset_settings[i]
    setting_color <- full_subset_colors[setting]
    
    # Get filtered data for this setting
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    # Get counts for this setting
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    n_obs <- nrow(data_s)
    setting_label <- paste0(setting, " (n=", n_treat, "+", n_control, ", obs=", n_obs, ")")
    
    # Run dynamic analysis for this setting
    setting_results <- list()
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            setting_results[[length(setting_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
    
    if (length(setting_results) == 0) {
        cat("Skipping plot for", setting, "- no results available\n")
        next
    }
    
    # Combine results for this setting
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(setting_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    # Add outcome labels
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    # Calculate percentage change
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    # Filter to key outcomes
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, color = setting_color) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), fill = setting_color,
                   size = 2, color = setting_color) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE, color = setting_color) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = setting_label,
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)\nPercentage values show % change: 100*(e^β - 1)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    
    # Save individual plot
    ggsave(paste0("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_", tolower(gsub(" ", "_", gsub("\\+", "plus", setting))), "_with_percentages.pdf"),
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r export_full_subset_dynamic}
# Collect all dynamic results for full subset and export to CSV
all_dynamic_full <- list()

for (setting in full_subset_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            all_dynamic_full[[length(all_dynamic_full) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            # Skip silently
        })
    }
}

if (length(all_dynamic_full) > 0) {
    dynamic_full_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_dynamic_full)
    dynamic_full_df <- dynamic_full_df[dynamic_full_df$term != "treat", ]
    dynamic_full_df$time <- as.numeric(dynamic_full_df$term)
    dynamic_full_df <- dynamic_full_df[dynamic_full_df$time >= -6 & dynamic_full_df$time <= 6, ]
    
    dynamic_full_df$outcome_label <- label_map[dynamic_full_df$outcome]
    dynamic_full_df <- dynamic_full_df[!is.na(dynamic_full_df$outcome_label), ]
    dynamic_full_df$significant <- (dynamic_full_df$conf.low > 0) | (dynamic_full_df$conf.high < 0)
    dynamic_full_df$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(dynamic_full_df$estimate) - 1)
    
    # Export
    dynamic_export_full <- dynamic_full_df[, c("setting", "outcome_label", "time", "estimate", 
                                                "std.error", "conf.low", "conf.high", 
                                                "significant", "percent_change")]
    colnames(dynamic_export_full) <- c("Setting", "Outcome", "Time", "Estimate", "SE", 
                                        "CI_Lower", "CI_Upper", "Significant", "Percent_Change")
    write.csv(dynamic_export_full, "../results/dynamic_effects_full_subset.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Dynamic effects (full subset) exported to ../results/dynamic_effects_full_subset.csv\n")
}
```

## Combined Setting Plots - Full Subset

```{r full_subset_combined_l1234, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2, L3, L4
combined_settings <- c("L1 Full Subset", "L2 Full Subset", "L3 Full Subset", "L4 Full Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = full_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2, L3, L4 Full Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_combined_l1234.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r full_subset_combined_l1234_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2, L3, L4 with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L1 Full Subset", "L2 Full Subset", "L3 Full Subset", "L4 Full Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = full_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2, L3, L4 Full Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_combined_l1234_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r full_subset_combined_l1_l2plus, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2+
combined_settings <- c("L1 Full Subset", "L2+ Full Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = full_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2+ Full Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_combined_l1_l2plus.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r full_subset_combined_l1_l2plus_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2+ with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L1 Full Subset", "L2+ Full Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = full_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2+ Full Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_combined_l1_l2plus_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r full_subset_combined_l12_l3plus, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L12, L3+
combined_settings <- c("L12 Full Subset", "L3+ Full Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = full_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L12, L3+ Full Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_combined_l12_l3plus.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r full_subset_combined_l12_l3plus_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L12, L3+ with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L12 Full Subset", "L3+ Full Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = full_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L12, L3+ Full Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_full_subset_combined_l12_l3plus_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

# Maturity Level Analysis: Agent Subset (AF Only)

This section analyzes the impact across different maturity levels for repos in the Agent First (AF) group only.

## Agent Subset Settings

```{r agent_subset_setup}
agent_subset_settings <- c(
    "L1 Agent Subset",
    "L2 Agent Subset",
    "L12 Agent Subset",
    "L3 Agent Subset",
    "L4 Agent Subset",
    "L2+ Agent Subset",
    "L3+ Agent Subset"
)
```

## Aggregate Treatment Effects - Agent Subset

```{r agent_subset_static}
# Calculate static effects for agent subset settings
static_results_agent <- list()
for (setting in agent_subset_settings) {
    cat("Calculating aggregate effects for:", setting, "\n")
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    static_results_agent[[setting]] <- list()
    for (var in outcome_vars) {
        static_results_agent[[setting]][[var]] <- get_static_effects(var, data_s)
    }
}

# Create comparison dataframe
static_comparison_agent <- data.frame()
for (setting in agent_subset_settings) {
    static_df <- data.frame(
        Setting = setting,
        Outcome = names(static_results_agent[[setting]]),
        Estimate = sapply(static_results_agent[[setting]], function(x) x$estimate[x$term == "treat"]),
        SE = sapply(static_results_agent[[setting]], function(x) x$std.error[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Lower = sapply(static_results_agent[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.low[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Upper = sapply(static_results_agent[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.high[x$term == "treat"])
    )
    static_comparison_agent <- rbind(static_comparison_agent, static_df)
}

# Calculate p-values and significance
static_comparison_agent$p_value <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(static_comparison_agent$Estimate / static_comparison_agent$SE))
static_comparison_agent$Sig <- ifelse(static_comparison_agent$p_value < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_agent$p_value < 0.01, "**",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_agent$p_value < 0.05, "*",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_agent$p_value < 0.1, ".", ""))))
static_comparison_agent$Percent_Change <- 100 * (exp(static_comparison_agent$Estimate) - 1)

# Clean outcome names
static_comparison_agent$Outcome <- gsub("log\\((.+) \\+ 1\\)", "\\1", static_comparison_agent$Outcome)
static_comparison_agent$Outcome <- gsub("_", " ", static_comparison_agent$Outcome)
static_comparison_agent$Outcome <- tools::toTitleCase(static_comparison_agent$Outcome)

# Display static effects table
knitr::kable(static_comparison_agent,
    digits = 3,
    col.names = c("Setting", "Outcome", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Lower", "CI Upper", "p-value", "Sig", "% Change"),
    caption = "Static Treatment Effects: Agent Subset (AF) by Maturity Level (*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05, . p<0.1)",
    row.names = FALSE
) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
        full_width = FALSE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L1 Agent Subset", 1, length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L2 Agent Subset", length(outcome_vars) + 1, 2 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L12 Agent Subset", 2 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 3 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L3 Agent Subset", 3 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 4 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L4 Agent Subset", 4 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 5 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L2+ Agent Subset", 5 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 6 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L3+ Agent Subset", 6 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 7 * length(outcome_vars))

# Export static effects to CSV
write.csv(static_comparison_agent, "../results/static_effects_agent_subset.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Static effects exported to ../results/static_effects_agent_subset.csv\n")
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects - Agent Subset

```{r agent_subset_dynamic, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Define colors for each setting
agent_subset_colors <- c(
    "#E69F00",  # L1 - Orange
    "#56B4E9",  # L2 - Sky Blue
    "#CC79A7",  # L12 - Pink
    "#009E73",  # L3 - Green
    "#F0E442",  # L4 - Yellow
    "#0072B2",  # L2+ - Blue
    "#D55E00"   # L3+ - Dark Orange
)
names(agent_subset_colors) <- agent_subset_settings

# Create a plot for each setting
for (i in seq_along(agent_subset_settings)) {
    setting <- agent_subset_settings[i]
    setting_color <- agent_subset_colors[setting]
    
    # Get filtered data for this setting
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    # Get counts for this setting
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    n_obs <- nrow(data_s)
    setting_label <- paste0(setting, " (n=", n_treat, "+", n_control, ", obs=", n_obs, ")")
    
    # Run dynamic analysis for this setting
    setting_results <- list()
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            setting_results[[length(setting_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
    
    if (length(setting_results) == 0) {
        cat("Skipping plot for", setting, "- no results available\n")
        next
    }
    
    # Combine results for this setting
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(setting_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    # Add outcome labels
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    # Filter to key outcomes
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, color = setting_color) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), fill = setting_color,
                   size = 2, color = setting_color) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = setting_label,
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    
    # Save individual plot
    ggsave(paste0("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_", tolower(gsub(" ", "_", gsub("\\+", "plus", setting))), ".pdf"),
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 4,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects - Agent Subset (with Percentages)

```{r agent_subset_dynamic_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=5}
# Create a plot for each setting with percentage labels
for (i in seq_along(agent_subset_settings)) {
    setting <- agent_subset_settings[i]
    setting_color <- agent_subset_colors[setting]
    
    # Get filtered data for this setting
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    # Get counts for this setting
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    n_obs <- nrow(data_s)
    setting_label <- paste0(setting, " (n=", n_treat, "+", n_control, ", obs=", n_obs, ")")
    
    # Run dynamic analysis for this setting
    setting_results <- list()
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            setting_results[[length(setting_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
    
    if (length(setting_results) == 0) {
        cat("Skipping plot for", setting, "- no results available\n")
        next
    }
    
    # Combine results for this setting
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(setting_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    # Add outcome labels
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    # Calculate percentage change
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    # Filter to key outcomes
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, color = setting_color) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant, fill = after_scale(ifelse(significant, setting_color, NA))),
                   size = 2, color = setting_color) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE, color = setting_color) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = setting_label,
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)\nPercentage values show % change: 100*(e^β - 1)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    
    # Save individual plot
    ggsave(paste0("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_", tolower(gsub(" ", "_", gsub("\\+", "plus", setting))), "_with_percentages.pdf"),
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r export_agent_subset_dynamic}
# Collect all dynamic results for agent subset and export to CSV
all_dynamic_agent <- list()

for (setting in agent_subset_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            all_dynamic_agent[[length(all_dynamic_agent) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            # Skip silently
        })
    }
}

if (length(all_dynamic_agent) > 0) {
    dynamic_agent_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_dynamic_agent)
    dynamic_agent_df <- dynamic_agent_df[dynamic_agent_df$term != "treat", ]
    dynamic_agent_df$time <- as.numeric(dynamic_agent_df$term)
    dynamic_agent_df <- dynamic_agent_df[dynamic_agent_df$time >= -6 & dynamic_agent_df$time <= 6, ]
    
    dynamic_agent_df$outcome_label <- label_map[dynamic_agent_df$outcome]
    dynamic_agent_df <- dynamic_agent_df[!is.na(dynamic_agent_df$outcome_label), ]
    dynamic_agent_df$significant <- (dynamic_agent_df$conf.low > 0) | (dynamic_agent_df$conf.high < 0)
    dynamic_agent_df$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(dynamic_agent_df$estimate) - 1)
    
    # Export
    dynamic_export_agent <- dynamic_agent_df[, c("setting", "outcome_label", "time", "estimate", 
                                                  "std.error", "conf.low", "conf.high", 
                                                  "significant", "percent_change")]
    colnames(dynamic_export_agent) <- c("Setting", "Outcome", "Time", "Estimate", "SE", 
                                         "CI_Lower", "CI_Upper", "Significant", "Percent_Change")
    write.csv(dynamic_export_agent, "../results/dynamic_effects_agent_subset.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Dynamic effects (agent subset) exported to ../results/dynamic_effects_agent_subset.csv\n")
}
```

## Combined Setting Plots - Agent Subset

```{r agent_subset_combined_l1234, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2, L3, L4
combined_settings <- c("L1 Agent Subset", "L2 Agent Subset", "L3 Agent Subset", "L4 Agent Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = agent_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2, L3, L4 Agent Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_combined_l1234.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r agent_subset_combined_l1234_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2, L3, L4 with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L1 Agent Subset", "L2 Agent Subset", "L3 Agent Subset", "L4 Agent Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = agent_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
```
