```{r agent_subset_combined_l1234_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2, L3, L4 Agent Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_combined_l1234_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r agent_subset_combined_l1_l2plus, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2+
combined_settings <- c("L1 Agent Subset", "L2+ Agent Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = agent_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2+ Agent Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_combined_l1_l2plus.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r agent_subset_combined_l1_l2plus_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2+ with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L1 Agent Subset", "L2+ Agent Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = agent_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2+ Agent Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_combined_l1_l2plus_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r agent_subset_combined_l12_l3plus, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L12, L3+
combined_settings <- c("L12 Agent Subset", "L3+ Agent Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = agent_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L12, L3+ Agent Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_combined_l12_l3plus.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r agent_subset_combined_l12_l3plus_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L12, L3+ with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L12 Agent Subset", "L3+ Agent Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = agent_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L12, L3+ Agent Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_agent_subset_combined_l12_l3plus_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

# Maturity Level Analysis: IDE Subset (IF Only)

This section analyzes the impact across different maturity levels for repos in the IDE First (IF) group only.

## IDE Subset Settings

```{r ide_subset_setup}
ide_subset_settings <- c(
    "L1 IDE Subset",
    "L2 IDE Subset",
    "L12 IDE Subset",
    "L3 IDE Subset",
    "L4 IDE Subset",
    "L2+ IDE Subset",
    "L3+ IDE Subset"
)
```

## Aggregate Treatment Effects - IDE Subset

```{r ide_subset_static}
# Calculate static effects for IDE subset settings
static_results_ide <- list()
for (setting in ide_subset_settings) {
    cat("Calculating aggregate effects for:", setting, "\n")
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    static_results_ide[[setting]] <- list()
    for (var in outcome_vars) {
        static_results_ide[[setting]][[var]] <- get_static_effects(var, data_s)
    }
}

# Create comparison dataframe
static_comparison_ide <- data.frame()
for (setting in ide_subset_settings) {
    static_df <- data.frame(
        Setting = setting,
        Outcome = names(static_results_ide[[setting]]),
        Estimate = sapply(static_results_ide[[setting]], function(x) x$estimate[x$term == "treat"]),
        SE = sapply(static_results_ide[[setting]], function(x) x$std.error[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Lower = sapply(static_results_ide[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.low[x$term == "treat"]),
        CI_Upper = sapply(static_results_ide[[setting]], function(x) x$conf.high[x$term == "treat"])
    )
    static_comparison_ide <- rbind(static_comparison_ide, static_df)
}

# Calculate p-values and significance
static_comparison_ide$p_value <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(static_comparison_ide$Estimate / static_comparison_ide$SE))
static_comparison_ide$Sig <- ifelse(static_comparison_ide$p_value < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_ide$p_value < 0.01, "**",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_ide$p_value < 0.05, "*",
                         ifelse(static_comparison_ide$p_value < 0.1, ".", ""))))
static_comparison_ide$Percent_Change <- 100 * (exp(static_comparison_ide$Estimate) - 1)

# Clean outcome names
static_comparison_ide$Outcome <- gsub("log\\((.+) \\+ 1\\)", "\\1", static_comparison_ide$Outcome)
static_comparison_ide$Outcome <- gsub("_", " ", static_comparison_ide$Outcome)
static_comparison_ide$Outcome <- tools::toTitleCase(static_comparison_ide$Outcome)

# Display static effects table
knitr::kable(static_comparison_ide,
    digits = 3,
    col.names = c("Setting", "Outcome", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Lower", "CI Upper", "p-value", "Sig", "% Change"),
    caption = "Static Treatment Effects: IDE Subset (IF) by Maturity Level (*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05, . p<0.1)",
    row.names = FALSE
) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
        full_width = FALSE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L1 IDE Subset", 1, length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L2 IDE Subset", length(outcome_vars) + 1, 2 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L12 IDE Subset", 2 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 3 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L3 IDE Subset", 3 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 4 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L4 IDE Subset", 4 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 5 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L2+ IDE Subset", 5 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 6 * length(outcome_vars)) %>%
    kableExtra::pack_rows("L3+ IDE Subset", 6 * length(outcome_vars) + 1, 7 * length(outcome_vars))

# Export static effects to CSV
write.csv(static_comparison_ide, "../results/static_effects_ide_subset.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Static effects exported to ../results/static_effects_ide_subset.csv\n")
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects - IDE Subset

```{r ide_subset_dynamic, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Define colors for each setting
ide_subset_colors <- c(
    "#E69F00",  # L1 - Orange
    "#56B4E9",  # L2 - Sky Blue
    "#CC79A7",  # L12 - Pink
    "#009E73",  # L3 - Green
    "#F0E442",  # L4 - Yellow
    "#0072B2",  # L2+ - Blue
    "#D55E00"   # L3+ - Dark Orange
)
names(ide_subset_colors) <- ide_subset_settings

# Create a plot for each setting
for (i in seq_along(ide_subset_settings)) {
    setting <- ide_subset_settings[i]
    setting_color <- ide_subset_colors[setting]
    
    # Get filtered data for this setting
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    # Get counts for this setting
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    n_obs <- nrow(data_s)
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment units (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    setting_label <- paste0(setting, " (n=", n_treat, "+", n_control, ", obs=", n_obs, ")")
    
    # Run dynamic analysis for this setting
    setting_results <- list()
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            setting_results[[length(setting_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
    
    if (length(setting_results) == 0) {
        cat("Skipping plot for", setting, "- no results available\n")
        next
    }
    
    # Combine results for this setting
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(setting_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    # Add outcome labels
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    # Filter to key outcomes
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, color = setting_color) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), fill = setting_color,
                   size = 2, color = setting_color) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = setting_label,
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    
    # Save individual plot
    ggsave(paste0("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_", tolower(gsub(" ", "_", gsub("\\+", "plus", setting))), ".pdf"),
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 4,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

## Dynamic Treatment Effects - IDE Subset (with Percentages)

```{r ide_subset_dynamic_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=5}
# Create a plot for each setting with percentage labels
for (i in seq_along(ide_subset_settings)) {
    setting <- ide_subset_settings[i]
    setting_color <- ide_subset_colors[setting]
    
    # Get filtered data for this setting
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    # Get counts for this setting
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    n_obs <- nrow(data_s)
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment units (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    setting_label <- paste0(setting, " (n=", n_treat, "+", n_control, ", obs=", n_obs, ")")
    
    # Run dynamic analysis for this setting
    setting_results <- list()
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            setting_results[[length(setting_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
    
    if (length(setting_results) == 0) {
        cat("Skipping plot for", setting, "- no results available\n")
        next
    }
    
    # Combine results for this setting
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(setting_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    # Add outcome labels
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    # Calculate percentage change
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    # Filter to key outcomes
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, color = setting_color) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant, fill = after_scale(ifelse(significant, setting_color, NA))),
                   size = 2, color = setting_color) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE, color = setting_color) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21), guide = "none") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = setting_label,
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            caption = "Filled dots: p < 0.05 (significant), Hollow dots: p ≥ 0.05 (non-significant)\nPercentage values show % change: 100*(e^β - 1)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11, margin = margin(t = 3)),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    
    # Save individual plot
    ggsave(paste0("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_", tolower(gsub(" ", "_", gsub("\\+", "plus", setting))), "_with_percentages.pdf"),
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r export_ide_subset_dynamic}
# Collect all dynamic results for ide subset and export to CSV
all_dynamic_ide <- list()

for (setting in ide_subset_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            all_dynamic_ide[[length(all_dynamic_ide) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            # Skip silently
        })
    }
}

if (length(all_dynamic_ide) > 0) {
    dynamic_ide_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_dynamic_ide)
    dynamic_ide_df <- dynamic_ide_df[dynamic_ide_df$term != "treat", ]
    dynamic_ide_df$time <- as.numeric(dynamic_ide_df$term)
    dynamic_ide_df <- dynamic_ide_df[dynamic_ide_df$time >= -6 & dynamic_ide_df$time <= 6, ]
    
    dynamic_ide_df$outcome_label <- label_map[dynamic_ide_df$outcome]
    dynamic_ide_df <- dynamic_ide_df[!is.na(dynamic_ide_df$outcome_label), ]
    dynamic_ide_df$significant <- (dynamic_ide_df$conf.low > 0) | (dynamic_ide_df$conf.high < 0)
    dynamic_ide_df$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(dynamic_ide_df$estimate) - 1)
    
    # Export
    dynamic_export_ide <- dynamic_ide_df[, c("setting", "outcome_label", "time", "estimate", 
                                              "std.error", "conf.low", "conf.high", 
                                              "significant", "percent_change")]
    colnames(dynamic_export_ide) <- c("Setting", "Outcome", "Time", "Estimate", "SE", 
                                       "CI_Lower", "CI_Upper", "Significant", "Percent_Change")
    write.csv(dynamic_export_ide, "../results/dynamic_effects_ide_subset.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Dynamic effects (ide subset) exported to ../results/dynamic_effects_ide_subset.csv\n")
}
```

## Combined Setting Plots - IDE Subset

```{r ide_subset_combined_l1234, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2, L3, L4
combined_settings <- c("L1 IDE Subset", "L2 IDE Subset", "L3 IDE Subset", "L4 IDE Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = ide_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2, L3, L4 IDE Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_combined_l1234.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r ide_subset_combined_l1234_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2, L3, L4 with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L1 IDE Subset", "L2 IDE Subset", "L3 IDE Subset", "L4 IDE Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = ide_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2, L3, L4 IDE Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_combined_l1234_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r ide_subset_combined_l1_l2plus, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2+
combined_settings <- c("L1 IDE Subset", "L2+ IDE Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = ide_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2+ IDE Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_combined_l1_l2plus.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r ide_subset_combined_l1_l2plus_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L1, L2+ with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L1 IDE Subset", "L2+ IDE Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = ide_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L1, L2+ IDE Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_combined_l1_l2plus_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r ide_subset_combined_l12_l3plus, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L12, L3+
combined_settings <- c("L12 IDE Subset", "L3+ IDE Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = ide_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L12, L3+ IDE Subset",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_combined_l12_l3plus.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

```{r ide_subset_combined_l12_l3plus_pct, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
# Combined plot for L12, L3+ with percentages
combined_settings <- c("L12 IDE Subset", "L3+ IDE Subset")
combined_results <- list()

for (setting in combined_settings) {
    data_s <- build_setting_variant(panel_data, setting)
    
    n_treat <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event > 0]))
    n_control <- length(unique(data_s$repo_name[data_s$event == 0]))
    
    if (n_treat < 5) {
        cat("Skipping", setting, "- insufficient treatment repos (n=", n_treat, ")\n")
        next
    }
    
    for (y in outcome_vars) {
        tryCatch({
            dyn <- didimputation::did_imputation(
                data = data_s,
                yname = y,
                gname = "event",
                tname = "time",
                idname = "repo_name",
                first_stage = ~ age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name + time,
                horizon = -6:6,
                pretrends = -6:-2
            )
            dyn$outcome <- y
            dyn$setting <- setting
            combined_results[[length(combined_results) + 1]] <- dyn
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Warning: Skipping", setting, "for outcome", y, "- insufficient data\n")
        })
    }
}

if (length(combined_results) > 0) {
    plot_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(combined_results)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$term != "treat", ]
    plot_data$time <- as.numeric(plot_data$term)
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$time >= -6 & plot_data$time <= 6, ]
    
    plot_data$outcome_label <- label_map[plot_data$outcome]
    plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$outcome_label), ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = outcome_names)
    plot_data$significant <- (plot_data$conf.low > 0) | (plot_data$conf.high < 0)
    plot_data$linetype_sig <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, "solid", "dotted")
    plot_data$percent_change <- 100 * (exp(plot_data$estimate) - 1)
    
    plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$outcome_label %in% key_outcomes, ]
    plot_data$outcome_label <- factor(plot_data$outcome_label, levels = key_outcomes)
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% distinct(setting, outcome_label, time, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = setting)) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, linetype = linetype_sig),
                      width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_point(aes(shape = significant), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent_change)),
                  vjust = -0.8, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        scale_color_manual(values = ide_subset_colors[combined_settings]) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 19, "FALSE" = 21)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -6:6) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.5, 6.5)) +
        scale_linetype_identity() +
        labs(
            title = "Combined: L12, L3+ IDE Subset (with Percentages)",
            x = "Months Relative to Agent Adoption",
            y = "Treatment Effect",
            color = "Setting",
            shape = "Significant"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
            strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ outcome_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1)
    
    print(p)
    ggsave("../plots/dynamic_effects_ide_subset_combined_l12_l3plus_with_percentages.pdf",
           plot = p, width = 18, height = 5,
           device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
}
```

# Summary of Exported Results

All analysis results have been exported to CSV files in the `../results/` directory:

## Static Treatment Effects

These files contain the aggregate (overall) treatment effects for each setting and outcome:

- **`static_effects_base_settings.csv`**: Base settings (AF vs IF)
- **`static_effects_full_subset.csv`**: Full subset (AF OR IF) by maturity levels
- **`static_effects_agent_subset.csv`**: Agent subset (AF only) by maturity levels  
- **`static_effects_ide_subset.csv`**: IDE subset (IF only) by maturity levels

Columns: Setting, Outcome, Estimate, SE, CI_Lower, CI_Upper, p_value, Sig, Percent_Change

## Dynamic Treatment Effects (Event Study)

These files contain time-varying treatment effects for each time period relative to adoption:

- **`dynamic_effects_base_settings.csv`**: Base settings (AF vs IF)
- **`dynamic_effects_full_subset.csv`**: Full subset by maturity levels
- **`dynamic_effects_agent_subset.csv`**: Agent subset by maturity levels
- **`dynamic_effects_ide_subset.csv`**: IDE subset by maturity levels

Columns: Setting, Outcome, Time, Estimate, SE, CI_Lower, CI_Upper, Significant, Percent_Change

**Time**: Months relative to agent adoption (-6 to +6, where 0 is adoption month)

**Percent_Change**: 100 * (exp(Estimate) - 1), representing the percentage change in the outcome
